title: Raising Cane's CEO on International Expansion Plans
description: AJ Kumaran, COO and Co-CEO of Raising Cane’s, discusses the restaurant chain’s growth. He tells Romaine Bostick and Bailey Lipschultz on “The Close” that the company has no plans to go public. (Source: Bloomberg)
